articles.title: I can’t help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee
articles.description: Arcee is a tiny 26-person U.S. startup that built a high-performing, massive, open source LLM. And it's gaining popularity with OpenClaw users.
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: VC Eclipse has a new $1.3B fund to back — and build — ‘physical AI’ startups
articles.description: Eclipse will put some of that money towards incubating, or building startups.
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec

articles.title: Iranian hackers are targeting American critical infrastructure, US agencies warn
articles.description: A joint FBI, NSA, and CISA advisory warns that Iranian hackers have "escalated" their tactics in response to the ongoing U.S.-Israel war with Iran.
articles.author: Zack Whittaker

articles.title: Firmus, the ‘Southgate’ AI data center builder backed by Nvidia, hits $5.5B valuation
articles.description: Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider Firmus has now raised $1.35 billion in six months.
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: Intel signs on to Elon Musk’s Terafab chips project
articles.description: Intel will join SpaceX and Tesla in an effort to build a new U.S. semiconductor factory in Texas, although the scope of its contributions are unclear.
articles.author: Tim Fernholz

articles.title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
articles.description: The new model will be used by a small number of high-profile companies to engage in defensive cybersecurity work.
articles.author: Lucas Ropek

articles.title: Apple’s foldable iPhone is on track to launch in September, report says
articles.description: The news follows a report from Nikkei Asia on Tuesday that raised concerns the company’s foldable iPhone could be delayed due to challenges during
articles.author: Aisha Malik

articles.title: Russian government hackers broke into thousands of home routers to steal passwords
articles.description: Fancy Bear, also known as APT28, has taken over thousands of residential home routers to steal passwords and authentication tokens in a wide-ranging
articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: Chrome finally adds a better way to deal with too many open tabs
articles.description: Google Chrome's latest update brings vertical tabs and a cleaner Reading Mode to help manage cluttered browsing.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Hate jump scares? This app warns you before they happen
articles.description: The app uses iPhone Live Activities to alert you when scary scenes are about to happen, while also tracking what to watch and where to stream it.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Uber is the latest to be won over by Amazon’s AI chips
articles.description: Uber is expanding its AWS contract to run more of its ride-sharing features on Amazon's chips. This is a thumb-of-the nose at Oracle and Google.
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: Anthropic ups compute deal with Google and Broadcom amid skyrocketing demand
articles.description: Anthropic bulked up its compute deal with Google and Broadcom as the company has seen its run-rate revenue surge to $30 billion.
articles.author: Rebecca Szkutak

articles.title: Google Maps can now write captions for your photos using AI
articles.description: Google is rolling out new features to make it easier for users to contribute local knowledge to Maps. Most notably, Gemini can now create captions
articles.author: Aisha Malik

articles.title: A teenage Minecraft YouTuber raised $1,234,567 for a meme prediction market called Giggles. It broke me.
articles.description: Justin Jin’s company Giggles – which he describes as “putting a trading app and TikTok together” – started as a joke.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: 4 days left to save close to $500 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes
articles.description: Four days left to save up to $482 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket. These low rates will disappear on April 10 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now.
articles.author: TechCrunch Events

articles.title: Why a former AirPods engineer is now building heat pumps
articles.description: Merino Energy has simplified the heat pump dramatically in a quest to make them cheaper and easier to install.
articles.author: Tim De Chant

articles.title: The AI gold rush is pulling private wealth into riskier, earlier bets

articles.author: Rebecca Bellan

articles.title: Adobe launches Acrobat-based Student Spaces, a free AI-powered study tool for students
articles.description: Adobe Acrobat Student Spaces is a free tool for students to use AI and create different kinds of study material from documents.
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: AI startup Rocket offers vibe McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of the cost
articles.description: Rocket's new AI platform combines strategy, product building, and competitive intelligence, aiming to move beyond code generation.
